items.name: AWS Parallel Computing Service supports in-place Slurm major version upgrades
items.summary: AWS Parallel Computing Service (PCS) now supports managed in-place Slurm version upgrades for existing clusters. You can move your clusters up to three Slurm major versions ahead with no disruption to running jobs.
